message.en:
"f2170b1 feat(navigation): implement manual back navigation handling in AppScreen
d446a8c feat(ui): implement global animation toggle support
2136bee feat(settings): add option to enable or disable app animations
328dac2 fix(ui): refine list item animations with ValueKey and loading state check
93e2d58 refactor(ui): add key support to animations and refine trigger logic
82327af refactor(history): remove scroll-driven styling from search bar
96490b4 feat(revenue): implement dashboard overview and detailed view
940f20e feat(revenue): update api integration and filter defaults
cdbabd9 chore: update versionarte.json and changelog to v0.6.8
"
message.vi: Chúng tôi đang bảo trì hệ thống. Vui lòng quay lại sau!
